entries.author: denis
entries.name: Dust: An Elysian Tail
entries.summary: Traducao em portugues do Brasil para Dust: An Elysian Tail com instalacao por ZIP em layout de SD.
entries.introPtBr: Immerse yourself in a gorgeous hand-painted world on a search for your true identity. As the mysterious warrior, Dust, your action-packed journey will take you from peaceful glades to snowy mountaintops and beyond.
entries.introEnUs: Immerse yourself in a gorgeous hand-painted world on a search for your true identity. As the mysterious warrior, Dust, your action-packed journey will take you from peaceful glades to snowy mountaintops and beyond.

entries.author: denis
entries.name: I am Setsuna
entries.summary: Porte para Switch da traducao em portugues do Brasil de I Am Setsuna, com interface adaptada e texturas traduzidas.
entries.introPtBr: Bringing back the JRPGs of yesteryear!
entries.introEnUs: Journey with Setsuna as she prepares to make the ultimate sacrifice and save the people of her land. A powerfully nostalgic experience, blending a classic style of story-telling, battle system and gameplay.
entries.intro: Bringing back the JRPGs of yesteryear!
